prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **DAZA 2.0L TFSI EA888 Gen3B** (CZPB) engine, targeting 380 HP and 480 Nm on 98 RON fuel with a **Garrett GT2867R .86 A/R turbocharger**, **APR High-Pressure Fuel Pump**, and **Schoech Racing 350 LPH port-injection fuel system** for ethanol blends (E30-E50)

034 Motorsport **Hybrid Turbo Inlet Pipe** with **Silicone Intake Hose** and **Forge Motorsport Dual-Port Blow-Off Valve** to eliminate boost leaks and improve throttle response on the **DAZA** platform

KW Suspension **Clubsport Coilovers** with **3-way adjustable damping** and **15mm front/10mm rear camber plates**, paired with **034 Motorsport Front Subframe Reinforcement Kit** and **H&R 25mm Front / 20mm Rear Sway Bars** for reduced body roll on the **MQB A0** chassis
estetica: Rocket Bunny **Pandem V2 Widebody Kit** for the **SQ2 (8WA)** with **custom 3M Matte Graphite Wrap** and **OEM+ Audi Sport S-line side skirts** for aggressive stance without overpowering the compact dimensions

Akrapović **Titanium Exhaust System** with **dual 90mm outlets** and **carbon fiber tips**, replacing the stock **400-cell catalytic converters** with **200-cell high-flow units** for a deeper, crackling exhaust note

OEM Audi **RS3-style LED Matrix Headlights** with **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** and **Morimoto XB LED Fog Lights**, paired with a **custom 3D-printed carbon fiber front splitter** (designed for the **SQ2’s unique bumper**) and **VMR V710 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** in **Gunmetal Finish** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R 245/35 R19 tires**
